name: Mida
description: Shopify-native session replay and conversion heatmap platform. Records shopper journeys, scroll maps, and revenue click heatmaps with AI-driven drop-off insights.

seo.title: Mida — Session Replay / UX Analytics
seo.meta_description: Mida: Shopify-native session replay and conversion heatmap platform. Records shopper journeys, scroll maps, and revenue click heatmaps with AI-driven drop-off i

when_to_use: Shopify session replay to analyze shopper drop-off
Revenue-attributed click heatmaps for product pages
AI-powered insights on checkout abandonment patterns
Scroll maps revealing content engagement on shop pages

pros: Shopify-native install with no tag manager wrestling
Revenue-weighted click maps link UX to dollars
AI drop-off insights flag funnel leaks automatically
Scroll and engagement maps tuned for PDP and cart flows
cons: Platform-locked to Shopify, no custom sites
Less useful for brands selling mostly off-site
Younger product with thinner review track record
AI insights quality depends on traffic volume
review.verdict: Sharp Shopify-only CRO replay tool that ties clicks to revenue, a niche bet worth testing if Shopify is your stack.
review.best_for: Shopify merchants optimizing PDP, cart and checkout conversion rates.
review.not_for: Headless commerce, non-Shopify stores or multi-platform brands.
